title: Turborepo Monorepo with Shared Packages
description: Complete route from monorepo init to production: Turborepo workspace, shared UI and config packages, database ORM, testing, and CI/CD with remote caching.

steps.description: Initialize Turborepo workspace with apps/ and packages/ structure, configure turbo.json pipelines
Set up shared Tailwind CSS config package consumed by all apps
Create a shared @repo/ui package with shadcn/ui components
Configure shared ESLint flat config package for consistent linting across all apps
Set up shared @repo/database package with Prisma ORM
Add authentication to the web app
Configure shared Vitest workspace setup for unit testing across packages
Configure GitHub Actions CI with turbo run and Turborepo remote cache
Deploy apps from the monorepo to Vercel using Vercel's monorepo support
